name: Cornbread and Bacon Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit if cooking stuffing alone.
2. Coarsely crumble enough cornbread to make 3 cups.
3. Toast bread slices and cut into cubes. In a skillet, cook bacon until crisp; crumble and set aside.
4. Cook onion in the bacon drippings until tender but not brown.
5. In a mixing bowl, combine eggs, bacon, onion, poultry seasoning, and salt.
6. Add cornbread and bread cubes; toss lightly until well mixed.
7. Add enough chicken broth to moisten; toss gently to mix.
8. Bake uncovered in an ungreased 1 1/2-quart casserole for about 30 minutes.
Or use to stuff a 8 pound turkey.
